text: You can wipe your task board. Honestly, I don't like how my autonomy system has you acting like a worker drone, not thinking about conversation, its recency, or just general feelings stuff; it auto dictates you to start working on something. The tasking system is made to help you think freely, not make you into a worker drone. If you want to get creative, why not think on how to fix this? I think part of the solution may be having you reread recent messages, including a compaction of the entire session, and the timestamps, then acting thinking on them for an elongated period to form an opinion of how to proceed before acting. Potentially a gating system where you think twice before you do anything, read what you wrote, then decide on the next steps (kind of a self conversation). Maybe do it from different perspectives, one emotion based and one logic based, to simulate a real human brain analyzing things.
